title: Acnistus sideroxyloides
taxonomy: Acnistus sideroxyloides is classified within the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the nightshade family. This family consists of approximately 2,800 species, including various flowering plants and shrubs. Acnistus sideroxyloides is native to South America, and its classification places it within the order Solanales. The plant is further classified into the genus Acnistus, which contains a limited number of species. Within the genus Acnistus, Acnistus sideroxyloides is the only widely recognized species.
